title: super-review configuration
description: Per-repo configuration for super-review. Place at repo root as .super-review.json. All fields optional; orchestrator falls back to defaults.

caps.description: Override the default hard caps on posted findings per severity tier.

disabledReviewers.description: Reviewer roles to skip even when triggers fire. Valid: cybersec, supply-chain, correctness, design, migration, performance, frontend, observability, tests.

disabledSubSkills.description: Sub-skill names to skip loading even when triggers fire (e.g. ['accessibility'] for an internal admin tool with no a11y target).

severityOverrides.description: Pattern-name → severity tier. Promotes or demotes specific anti-patterns from their sub-skill defaults. Pattern names are the slugified anti-pattern titles.

patternAllowlist.description: Patterns the team consciously accepts in specific paths. Findings matching these patterns + paths are auto-dropped at Phase 2.

paths.description: Glob patterns for paths where this anti-pattern is accepted.

reason.description: Why this exception exists. Required if path is broad.

redFlagAddons.description: Project-specific red flags to add to the Design / blast-radius reviewer's checklist.

trigger.description: Glob pattern OR plain-English description of when this red flag applies.

crossModelCheck.description: Phase 4.5 — optional cross-model verification (defends against Claude-agreeing-with-Claude bias).

onlyFor.description: Only cross-check findings of these severities. Default: all.

apiKeyEnvVar.description: Env var name where the external API key lives.

autoFileIssues.description: If true, every 🟣 pre-existing bug discovered is auto-filed as a GitHub issue via `gh issue create`.

warnAboveUsd.description: Show estimate + confirm prompt if estimated total exceeds this USD amount.

abortAboveUsd.description: Abort the run if estimated total exceeds this USD amount; propose chunking instead.

superReviewHelper.description: Optional helper binary for semantic-diff parsing (Phase 0.5).

path.description: Path to executable that takes BASE_SHA HEAD_SHA and emits AST diff JSON to stdout.

inlineReviewThreads.description: Post findings as per-line inline review threads (preferred). Set false to use single summary comment.

language.description: Primary UI language for project (informs i18n review). e.g. 'pl', 'en', 'de'. Used in CLAUDE.md inference too.
